title: Nothing But New
subtitle: Zero repeats, wherever you're standing
learning_goal: Build Dex depth with new species and new places rather than repeated finds.
unlock_hint: Complete Food Web Anywhere and reach 5 Dex species.
intro: Five species in your Dex means you're past the easy finds. This challenge only counts species you've never logged -- four finds, zero repeats, wherever you happen to be.
outro: Four brand-new species in a single outing -- collectors chase streaks like that for years. Your Dex isn't a beginner's Dex anymore.

steps.description: Find a species that's new to your Dex
Find a new insect, spider, or snail
steps.hint: Snails hide under damp things, spiders keep to corners. At least one of them is new to you.

steps.description: Find a new damselfly, butterfly, or moth
steps.hint: Odonata patrol water and sunny clearings. Butterflies work the flowers. Moths wait near lights.

steps.description: Find a new species 100 meters from all your old finds
steps.hint: New ground grows new species. The farther from your usual spots, the easier this one gets.
